novel_features.name: tags audit
novel_features.description: Audit tags for case and spacing drift; groups near-duplicate tags and generates ready-to-run merge commands

novel_features.name: items missing-pdf
novel_features.description: List items with no attached PDF — download queue ready to script

novel_features.name: items audit
novel_features.description: Count items missing PDFs, abstracts, DOIs, or tags in one command

novel_features.name: library stats
novel_features.description: Library breakdown by item type, year, and top journals

novel_features.name: items unfiled
novel_features.description: List items with no collection assignment

novel_features.name: tags inventory
novel_features.description: List all tags in a collection with item counts vs library-wide usage

novel_features.name: items venues
novel_features.description: Count items by publication venue with year ranges

novel_features.name: items stale
novel_features.description: Find old items with no PDF and no annotations

novel_features.name: reading list
novel_features.description: Surface oldest unread papers tagged to-read, sorted by date added

novel_features.name: annotations export
novel_features.description: Export all highlights from a collection as a single markdown file

novel_features.name: annotations timeline
novel_features.description: See annotations ordered by date for any time window

novel_features.name: items open
novel_features.description: Jump from CLI search results directly to the item in the Zotero desktop app

novel_features.name: items note-template
novel_features.description: Generate a markdown reading-note template for Obsidian or Logseq

novel_features.name: collections export
novel_features.description: Export a collection and all subcollections as a single BibTeX or CSL-JSON file

novel_features.name: items citekey-conflicts
novel_features.description: Find items missing Better BibTeX citation keys or with duplicate keys

novel_features.name: items preprint-check
novel_features.description: Check arXiv preprints for published CrossRef records

novel_features.name: items duplicates
novel_features.description: Find duplicate items by DOI, ISBN, or title

novel_features.name: items find
novel_features.description: Find locally synced items by DOI, ISBN, PMID, or citation key

novel_features.name: collections stats
novel_features.description: Analytics for a collection: item count, PDF coverage, year range, top journals
